name: Organic Vegetables Box
desc: Seasonal veggies — spinach, broccoli, capsicum, beans & more. Harvested fresh daily.

name: Fresh Fruits Basket
desc: Naturally ripened apples, mangoes, papayas, bananas — no pesticides.

name: Whole Grains & Pulses
desc: Organic wheat, rice, moong, masoor — stone-ground, unprocessed.

name: Cold-Pressed Oils
desc: Pure mustard, coconut & groundnut oils — cold-pressed to retain nutrients.

name: Raw Honey & Spices
desc: Wildflower honey and hand-ground spices — turmeric, cumin, coriander, cardamom.

name: A2 Dairy & Eggs
desc: A2 cow milk, desi ghee, curd and free-range eggs from partner farms.

name: Organic Tomatoes
desc: Vine-ripened, pesticide-free tomatoes from Rajasthan farms.

name: Desi Bananas
desc: Naturally ripened desi bananas — sweet, soft and freshly harvested.
